source.title: 7天搞定雅思高频核心词
source.input: 35 MP3 tracks containing isolated English word pronunciations

extraction.method: voice-boundary segmentation, whole-track ASR, isolated-word rechecks, lexical and duplicate audit

words.notes: homophone cannot be distinguished from audio alone: complement / compliment

additional candidate: desentious; final lexical correction: desentious -> dissentious

two consecutive pronunciations both resolve to patronage
